meaning: vbl.[be的过去式]第二人称单数直说法
examples: Thou wast under oath, and so swore falsely when thou saidst the value was but eightpence.
Where wast thou when I laid the foundations of the earth?
I will judge thee in the place where thou wast created, in the land of thy nativity.
That wast, and art, and evermore shalt be!
